revision.comment: Bot: mark 1 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:今宿大塚古墳]]
{{infobox ancient site|Kofun in Japan|ja|日本の古墳 |名称 = Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun |image = File:福岡今宿大塚古墳.jpg |imageキャプション = Ōtsuka Kofun (2011) |alternate_name = Ōtsuka Kofun |location = {{ill|Nishi-ku|qid=Q1132402|1=Nishi-ku, Fukuoka}} |coordinates = {{Coord|33.57322222222222|N|130.2705|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |omitted = JP-40 |type = {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}} |area = Total length 64m |Burial Facility = burial chamber remains uninvestigated |built = |Interred Persons = Unknown |史跡 = |地図 = |地図2 = |ラベル = |ラベル位置 = }}
== Overview ==
'''Imajuku Ōtsuka Kofun''' (今宿大塚古墳) is a {{ill|Kofun|en|Kofun|qid=Q1141225|lt=Kofun|1=Kofun}} located in {{ill|Nishi-ku|en|Nishi-ku|qid=Q296095|lt=Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|1=Nishi-ku}}, {{ill|Fukuoka|en|Fukuoka|qid=Q26600|lt=Fukuoka|1=Fukuoka}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=福岡市 今宿大塚古墳（今宿古墳群） |url=https://www.city.fukuoka.lg.jp/nishiku/c-shinko/charm/nisikunotakara/imajuku_otuka_kofun.html |website=福岡市 |access-date=2022-07-15 |language=ja}}</ref>
Located on a '''low plateau''' at the northern foot of {{ill|Mount Takasu|ja|高祖山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mount Takasu|qq=}}, this kofun is a '''mid-6th century''' {{ill|Zenpokoenfun|en|Zenpokoenfun|qid=Q11268718|lt=Zenpokoenfun|1=Zenpōkōenfun}}, with its front section facing '''west'''.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=今宿古墳群（大塚古墳） {{!}} 文化財情報検索 |url=https://bunkazai.city.fukuoka.lg.jp/cultural_properties/detail/item_id:101016 |website=福岡市の文化財 |access-date=2022-07-15 |language=ja}}</ref> It is part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Group|ja|今宿古墳群|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Group|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135579222}} and was Historic Site1 as a '''National Historic Site''' on '''February 7, 1928''', with an additional Historic Site on '''April 5, 2004'''.<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=国cultural property等データベース |url=https://kunishitei.bunka.go.jp/heritage/detail/401/2614 |website=kunishitei.bunka.go.jp |access-date=2022-07-15}}</ref>
== burial ==
This kofun has a '''total length of 64 meters''', with a '''long axis running east-west'''. It is built using a '''two-tiered construction method'''.<ref name="pYzG-2">{{Cite book|和書|author=Supervised by Itoshima District Social Education Promotion Association, Cultural Department |title=Ito Country Archaeological Guidebook |publisher=Itoshima Newspaper Co., Ltd. |date=2001 |page=100 |isbn=}}</ref>
In '''1977''', the kofun was '''covered with grass''' to preserve its type. A '''moat''' surrounds the mound.<ref>{{Cite book|和書|title=Imajuku Chamber of Commerce 60th Anniversary Commemorative Journal |publisher=Imajuku Chamber of Commerce |date=1990 |page=1 |isbn=}}</ref> The kofun and its surroundings have been developed into '''Ōtsuka Kofun Park'''.
== excavations ==
Pottery from '''{{ill|Yeongsan River|en|Yeongsan River|qid=Q489956|lt=Yeongsan River|1=Yeongsan River}}-style''' kilns has been discovered at the site.<ref>{{Cite book|和書|author=Fukuoka City History Editorial Committee |title=City History Research: Fukuoka, Vol. 13 |publisher=Fukuoka City Museum |date=2018 |page=91 |isbn=}}</ref> Other finds include: * '''[[Cylindrical Haniwa|Cylindrical haniwa]]''', '''warrior haniwa''', and '''horse-shaped haniwa''' found in the outer embankment * '''Sue pottery''' and other ceramics<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=福岡市 今宿大塚古墳（今宿古墳群） |url=https://www.city.fukuoka.lg.jp/nishiku/c-shinko/charm/nisikunotakara/imajuku_otuka_kofun.html |website=福岡市 |access-date=2022-07-15 |language=ja}}</ref>
The burial chamber remains '''uninvestigated'''.<ref name="pYzG-2"/>
== Access ==
=== By train === * '''{{ill|Chikuhi Line|en|Chikuhi Line|qid=Q1042132|lt=Chikuhi Line|1=Chikuhi Line}}''' – 15-minute walk from '''{{ill|Imajuku Station|en|Imajuku Station|qid=Q5368227|lt=Imajuku Station|1=Imajuku Station}}'''<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=今宿大塚古墳 {{!}} 福岡観光地検索 |url=http://www.crossroadfukuoka.jp/event/?mode=detail&id=4000000000458&isSpot=1 |website=福岡県観光情報 クロスロードふくおか |access-date=2022-07-15 |language=ja}}</ref>
=== By bus === * '''{{ill|Nishitetsu Bus|ja|西鉄バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishitetsu Bus|1=Nishitetsu Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11629843}}''' – about '''400m from "Nishi Police Station-mae" stop'''
== References == {{Reflist}}
- Located in {{ill|Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi-ku, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Imajuku Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Imajuku Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site. * {{ill|Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Ōtsuka Kofun|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru, Fukuoka|qq=}}, Fukuoka Prefecture. Part of the {{ill|Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanushimaru Kofun Cluster|qq=}}. Designated a national historic site.
== Related Articles == * {{ill|Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōtsuka Kofun Cluster (disambiguation)|qq=}}
{{Kofun navbar}}
{{translated page|ja|今宿大塚古墳|version=104270139|comment=Imported full ja history}}
